items.headline: 37 broken crons fixed yesterday. Infra is clean for the first time in weeks.
items.detail: 5 work queue sessions, 37 cron fixes. Root cause was hello@ OAuth token expiring - every script using it was silently hanging. All 28 scripts now on admin@. Channel conflicts, timeouts, path errors all resolved. Every automated system should fire clean today.

items.headline: MRR bounced back to $44.8K - up $3.2K from Thursday's $41.6K low.
items.detail: 63 collecting families, up from 60 two days ago. 3 families came back or activated. The dip was real but the recovery is fast. Stripe balance at $24.5K ($14.3K available, $10.1K pending). Revenue at risk down to $714 from $830.

items.headline: Tom is your DC engine right now - 3 closes, 42.9% rate, highest SIEL on the team.
items.detail: Tom scored 6.57 avg across 7 calls. Emily Brady follow-up on Tuesday is the next live deal. Anthony holding at 40% but E score (2.2) is the gap. Rye at 0% close rate with declining trend - coaching pack shipped but needs to land this week.

items.headline: Program Milestone Engine is live - W4/W8/W12 check-ins now automated.
items.detail: 11 families flagged in W4 window yesterday. Norri gets call lists with openers, questions, green/red flags & renewal scripts. Harry gets exec view. 6 new HubSpot properties tracking check-in completion. This is the retention infrastructure that didn't exist before.

items.headline: Partner/co-parent objection is killing deals - 7 instances this week, avg grade 2.6/5.
items.detail: Both Tom & Anthony are losing deals on the 'need to check with my partner' objection. Elisabeth Poole & Kristy Richards both went to Call Objection instead of Follow Up. The partner close sequence isn't landing. This is coachable but needs a specific drill.

leo_actions: Cron infrastructure fully rebuilt - all 37 fixes live, monitoring for clean runs today
Program Milestone Engine running daily 8:30am - Norri & Harry getting W4/W8/W12 call lists
Weekly Business Digest shipping Fridays 5pm - first one went out yesterday with real data
DC daily summary script live - Harry & Rye get automated rep reports at 4pm
